name: Software Teams -- Manual Recipe (ingest -> agent-turn -> output, built-in nodes only)

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Start here. Update 'Set (Configure)' below with your ticket URL and GitHub details.

nodes.name: Set (Configure)
nodes.notes: Replace source/ticketUrl with your ticket. Set githubOwner/githubRepo for the output verb.

nodes.name: Execute: ingest
nodes.notes:
Fetches the ticket and emits an initial NodeEnvelope on stdout.
Requires CLICKUP_API_KEY (or DATADOG_API_KEY/DATADOG_APP_KEY) as worker env vars.
The --source flag is a closed enum (safe); --ref is a canvas-configured URL (workflow-author trust boundary per R-07).

nodes.name: Code: Prep agent-turn
nodes.notes: Parses ingest stdout -> writes envelope to temp file for safe stdin piping (R-08).

nodes.name: Execute: agent-turn
nodes.notes:
Runs one specialist turn via the existing engine.
Requires: claude binary on worker PATH + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.
Self-hosted n8n only (n8n Cloud cannot run the claude binary -- AC9/R-01).
The envelope is piped via stdin (temp file), never interpolated into the command string (R-08).

nodes.name: Code: Prep output
nodes.notes: Parses agent-turn stdout, routes on status field, writes envelope to temp file for output verb.

nodes.name: IF: status ok?
nodes.notes:
True (top) branch: status='ok' -> proceed to GitHub output.
False (bottom) branch: status='needs-input' (HITL) or 'error'.
note: both ok and needs-input exit code 0 per AC7 -- use the status field to distinguish.

nodes.name: Execute: output (PR)
nodes.notes:
Creates a GitHub PR from the completed envelope.
Requires GITHUB_TOKEN or GH_TOKEN as worker env vars.
The envelope is piped via stdin (R-08 safe pattern). Only owner/repo/base (canvas-configured) are interpolated.

nodes.name: Code: Result
nodes.notes: Parses output verb result. prUrl contains the created GitHub PR URL.

nodes.name: Code: HITL / error branch
nodes.notes:
Handles needs-input (HITL) and error statuses.
Extend this branch with a Slack node to ask the human the agent's question,
wait for a response, and loop back to Execute: agent-turn.
